meetings.summary: Meeting done. Acme pushed everything to Q3. Budget got cut by 20%. Sarah is now out, Mark is the new decision maker.
Agreed on Q2 pilot. Sarah Chen (CTO) requested security audit before sign-off. Action item on our side still open to send the security dossier.
Initial demo completed. High interest in pilot. Sarah requested details on Net-30 payment terms and pricing structure.
Sent formal proposal for $250K. James Wright is coordinating internal sign-offs. Targeting mid-Q3 start.

files.content:
ACME CORP PILOT AGREEMENT

1. SCOPE: Pilot deployment for 500 seats.
2. PAYMENT: Terms are Net-30 from invoice date.
3. AUTO-RENEWAL (Clause 4.2): This agreement automatically renews for successive 12-month terms unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least 30 days prior to the expiration of the current term.
4. SERVICE LEVEL AGREEMENT: 99.9% uptime target.
